experience.summary: Full-stack + DevOps on a microservices learning platform
experience.bulletsText:
- Onboarding and extending a *Lua-based legacy codebase* (scripting layer over a larger engine/backend), reading undocumented modules, tracing data flow across host–script boundaries, and shipping production fixes within the existing architecture
- Implemented new *Lua* features end-to-end: added gameplay/business logic handlers, refactored state-heavy scripts into modular patterns, and wired them into the engine's event/callback API
- Debugged and stabilized production issues by tracing *Lua stack traces* through the host application, identifying root causes across scripting and native layers, and delivering fixes without regressions
- Built and maintained *config-driven Lua tables* for content/rules (quests, workflows, assessment logic), enabling non-engineers to update behavior without code deploys
- Implemented *Agent Aggregation Features* that unify multi-agent outputs into cohesive product experiences
- Owned *CI/CD pipelines* and *Dockerized* service deployments; managed environment configs and rollouts across staging/production
- Re-optimized *React Native* and web application performance with targeted rendering and delivery improvements

experience.summary: Led AI engineering for BRIO AI and full-stack delivery across enterprise apps
experience.bulletsText:
- *BRIO Health AI*: Built agentic search engine using *LangGraph*, *Vertex AI RAG*, *Gemini-2.5-Flash*, and *Python* async services
- Reduced PDF processing time by *60-65%* with custom OCR (Tesseract/PyMuPDF pipelines) and intelligent chunk processing
- Designed microservice communication using message queues and *Protobuf* contracts for reliable data flow
- Built backend systems for Research Studio, Paper Vault, AI Notebook, AI Transcribe with RAG capabilities using *Pinecone* + *Postgres pgvector*
- Implemented a custom *conversational memory layer* for agent state, achieving *2X better response quality* through persistent context management across sessions
- *Serma Event Management*: Led Finance system with *Stripe webhooks*, automated invoice generation, and role-based access controls
- *Zuno Training*: Built canvas-based course creation with *D3.js*, unified multimedia interface, and *React Native* companion app
- *Whisp Landing Page*: Optimized UI with *Tailwind CSS*, improved load time by *50%* (4s to 2s) via code-splitting and image optimization
- Containerized services with *Docker* and maintained *GitLab CI/CD* pipelines for automated builds, tests, and zero-downtime deployments across staging and production

experience.summary: Engineered healthcare platforms, analytics systems, and a computer-vision pipeline
experience.bulletsText:
- *Doct App*: Built healthcare platform with *Golang/GIN*, *Next.js 13*, *PostgreSQL*, achieving *4X faster APIs*
- Implemented role-based access control, encrypted database entries for healthcare compliance (*HIPAA-aligned patterns*)
- Developed patient document management with S3 integration, enabling progress monitoring across web and *React Native* clients
- *Salesman Analytics*: Created admin dashboard with *Vite + React.js*, automated MARG ERP extraction
- Improved salesman experience by *50%* eliminating paper-based orders, real-time price transparency
- *Pose Detection*: Developed *Python* + *TensorFlow* CNN and MediaPipe solution for posture analysis with custom datasets and real-time inference
